summary: My-Way now exposes a portable companion scaffold with separate event, note, bridge, and guardrail layers.
evidence: runtime/README.md defines truth layering and artifact boundaries
runtime/schemas/*.schema.json freeze event, note, and reflection packet fields
scripts/*.py validate and smoke-test the scaffold
local_decision_reason: The public scaffold is stable enough to share as a portable reference without exporting any private memory or routing details.
